text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: What?! Dang it! Have they come already?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
The Sandmen must be launching their attack!
They knock people dead asleep and take over
their bodies!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: I've been fighting them off in secret all this time...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Ngh... But it seems my time has come. The fate of
the world is in your hands now, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that, Gold Ship lies down on the sofa in the
trainer's office.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And in seconds, she's out like a light. I can't
comment on the Sandmen invasion, but Gold Ship
definitely needs more sleep.
